title: Proximity Deathmessage
description: Adds death messages only in a certain Chunk radius
body:
Minecraft mod that adds death messages in a limited Radius.

This mod adds a feature to only show death messages in a 12x12x12 (default) Chunk radius, (this can be changed in the config between 4-32 Chunks) so other people that are not near you can see your death. 
  
This mod is a server-side-mod, so it is not needed to add this mod on your client.
